'''mamuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickernut|nickernut]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-m-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickernut|nickernut]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mamuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæmiwith|mæmiwith]] || [[word:mæmiwij|mæmiwij]] || [[word:mæmiwish|mæmiwish]] || [[word:mæmiwi|mæmiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mamumuwuth|mamumuwuth]] || [[word:mamumuwuj|mamumuwuj]] || [[word:mamumuwush|mamumuwush]] || [[word:mamumuwu|mamumuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mamuwuth|mamuwuth]] || [[word:mamuwuj|mamuwuj]] || [[word:mamuwush|mamuwush]] || [[word:mamuwu|mamuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mamufwuth|mamufwuth]] || [[word:mamufwuj|mamufwuj]] || [[word:mamufwush|mamufwush]] || [[word:mamufwuf|mamufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mamuwuthu|mamuwuthu]] || [[word:mamuwuju|mamuwuju]] || [[word:mamuwushu|mamuwushu]] || [[word:mamuwuku|mamuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mamuwuth|mamuwuth]] || [[word:mamuwuj|mamuwuj]] || [[word:mamuwush|mamuwush]] || [[word:mamuwu|mamuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mamuwuthul|mamuwuthul]] || [[word:mamuwujul|mamuwujul]] || [[word:mamuwushul|mamuwushul]] || [[word:mamuwukul|mamuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mamuwuthuthu|mamuwuthuthu]] || [[word:mamuwujuju|mamuwujuju]] || [[word:mamuwushushu|mamuwushushu]] || [[word:mamuwuku|mamuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mamuwuthun|mamuwuthun]] || [[word:mamuwujun|mamuwujun]] || [[word:mamuwushun|mamuwushun]] || [[word:mamuwukun|mamuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mamuwuthuoro|mamuwuthuoro]] || [[word:mamuwujuoro|mamuwujuoro]] || [[word:mamuwushuoro|mamuwushuoro]] || [[word:mamuwukuoro|mamuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
